page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.re6p family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 52 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. With a thread-per-core ratio of 1.0, each of the 52 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio position this instance for workloads requiring predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead. The hardware profile is suitable for memory-sensitive applications, database workloads such as Redis, and general-purpose enterprise applications that benefit from dedicated Intel Xeon execution resources and stable network throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is a KVM-based server instance configured with 52 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor on the x86_64 architecture, it features a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring each vCPU has a dedicated physical core without hyperthreading. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps but does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage. With approximately 3.69 GB of memory per core, this configuration offers a balanced resource profile. It is designed for workloads requiring predictable, dedicated compute performance and moderate memory capacity, such as in-memory databases, caching layers like Redis, and general-purpose enterprise applications.

tagline: A dedicated-core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory and baseline network performance for predictable enterprise and database workloads.
bullet_points: 52 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs with no hyperthreading
192.0 GB of system memory providing 3.69 GB per core
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for stable data transfer
Zero local storage and no integrated GPUs, requiring external volumes
KVM hypervisor architecture on x86_64 platform
Well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and general-purpose applications
